source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/01_HAD1717MC(MG)/▶ 국내 제조인증/2. Infou 콘솔 추가 기술문서/설계변경/HAD1717MC, MG_BOM_Rev.2_2020.06.26.xlsx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Part list/BOM for HAD1717MC, HAD1717MG, and shared HAD1717MC/MG accessories including detector, power box, packaging, labels, manuals, and console options.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports technical documentation and design-change records for product-specific regulatory/manufacturing files.
keyPoints: HAD1717MC is listed as a Retrofit Detector with CsI Type.
HAD1717MG is listed as a Retrofit Detector with GDX Type.
Shared HAD1717MC/MG accessories include LAN cable, AC cables by country, trigger cable, main data cables, labels, manuals, and an ImfoU Console USB CD key.
Detector assemblies include panel modules, boards, cables, mechanical parts, power box, packaging, CD, CD case, and ShockWatch items.

evidence.claim: HAD1717MC is a Retrofit Detector and CsI Type.
HAD1717MG is a Retrofit Detector and GDX Type.
HAD1717MC detector assembly includes HAD1717MC OQC Module Ass'y.
HAD1717MG detector assembly includes HAD1717MG OQC Module Ass'y.
The HAD1717MC CsI panel module includes TFT Panel_17X17 and CsI material.
evidence.evidenceText: 1717 PANEL MODULE_CsI ... TFT Panel_17X17 ... CsI,CsI ... Cesium Iodide 99.999 pure with code 42404

evidence.claim: The HAD1717MG GDX panel module includes 1717 TFT Panel and 1717 Gods material.
evidence.evidenceText: 1717 PANEL MODULE_Gods ... 1717 TFT Panel ... 1717 Gods,Gods ... DRZ-PLUS, 434mm*434mm*0.465T

evidence.claim: Shared accessories include country-specific AC cables.
evidence.evidenceText: AC Cable (220V) / 한국 ... AC Cable (110V) / 미국 ... AC Cable (110V) / 일본 ... AC Cable (220V) / 브라질

evidence.claim: The accessory list includes ImfoU Console feel-DRCS USB CD key for GMP use.
evidence.evidenceText: Console_007,feel-DRCS (USB CD KEY) ... ImfoU Console / feel-DRCS (USB CD KEY),임포유 ... GMP향 / 신규 추가

evidence.claim: Domestic, US, and Europe product and packing labels are listed for HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG.
evidence.evidenceText: HAD1717MC 제품 Label ... 국내향 ... 미국향 ... 유럽향 ... HAD1717MG 제품 Packing Label ... 국내향 ... 미국향 ... 유럽향

reviewFlags.reason: Revision evidence conflicts: source text repeatedly states REV 1, while the sourcePath filename contains Rev.2.
Document date is taken from the sourcePath filename; source text only shows partial dates such as 3/25 and 6/26 without a year.
Authority signal indicates MFDS/domestic, but the source text does not explicitly name MFDS; it only contains domestic-use wording such as 국내향.
Some rows contain likely OCR or conversion inconsistencies, including Gods/GDX wording and supplier spellings such as 휴캠/휴켐.
